3032.issue: [S3032] No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "v6.2.2" was found for current release 6.2.2. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

5004.issue: [S5004] Plain setInterval() found in source files (src/lib/tibberLocal.ts). Please use this.setInterval() or adapter.setInterval() instead.

5054.issue: [S5054] method "setObject()" should be avoided. Please use "setObjectNotExists()" or "extendObject()" instead.

Please add the standard Sentry notice near the top of [README.md](https://github.com/hombach/ioBroker.tibberlink/blob/master/README.md).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.1" at [package.json](https://github.com/hombach/ioBroker.tibberlink/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
